title: colubrina macrocarpa var. macrocarpoides
intro: Colubrina macrocarpa var. macrocarpoides, also known as the false colubrina, is a plant species native to Central and South America. It is a shrub or small tree with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Colubrina macrocarpa var. macrocarpoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in herbal remedies.
